title: Douyin Livestream Commerce Screenshot AI
sourceTitle: Douyin Livestream Commerce Screenshot AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Douyin Chinese TikTok vertical livestream commerce screenshot featuring adult female fashion streamer smiling at the live camera selling stockings and lingerie retail items with specified live metrics and gift overlays. Subject: adult female fashion streamer smiling at the live camera appears as an adult retail livestream host, centered in the phone interface, presenting stockings and lingerie retail items with friendly shopping-channel energy and safe fashion-retail framing. Scene: Douyin Chinese TikTok vertical livestream commerce interface surrounds the host with a vertical live interface, pinned product shelf, scrolling comments, floating hearts, product thumbnails, and active commerce controls. Composition: Phone screenshot layout with top live badge, viewer count 99,996, heat marker 18+ trending heat level, product card, comment stream, and a visible virtual gift moment from Xiaohu sending an airplane virtual gift. Signature Elements: Preserved douyin livestream commerce screenshot source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Photorealistic smartphone livestream capture with polished Chinese short-video commerce UI, believable compression, crisp overlay text, social-commerce density, and live shopping immediacy. Color Palette: Douyin-inspired black, white, red, cyan, and magenta UI accents mixed with soft skin tones, retail pink highlights, and bright product-card whites. Lighting: Soft phone-camera beauty lighting, frontal livestream glow, subtle screen reflections, bright UI highlights, and clean indoor creator-studio exposure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
